details: Read program factory, writer kernel, reader kernel, compute kernels (pack_untilize and untilize), and supporting files
Read program factory, both compute kernels, reader, writer. Starting deep analysis.
Read program factory, all 3 kernels (reader/compute/writer), tensor_layouts tech report, and queried DeepWiki for TensorAccessor, tilize operation, and CB APIs
Read tilize_helpers.hpp, program factory header, tensor_accessor tech report. Understanding CB page size requirement, TensorAccessor pattern, tilize helper API.
Queried DeepWiki on untilize operation, pack_untilize vs slow untilize, and output CB layout after pack_untilize
Read untilize_helpers.inl, dest_helpers.hpp, cb_helpers.hpp for understanding untilize compute pipeline and DEST limits
Read tilize_helpers.inl - full implementation of compute_kernel_lib::tilize helper. Understanding block processing loop, WaitBlock mode, fast_tilize detection, and CB pop/push semantics.
Beginning to write tilize_single_core_analysis.md with focus on reader kernel pattern, input CB sizing, stick-to-tile batching, and work distribution.
Beginning to write untilize_single_core_analysis.md with focus on output stage: writer pattern, output CB sizing, stick extraction from tiles
Queried DeepWiki for FPU vs SFPU, binary_dest_reuse, UnpackToDestMode, tile_regs pipeline, split_work_to_cores. All key concepts now understood.
All research complete. Writing batch_norm_analysis.md with compute_core focus for group_norm reference.
untilize_single_core output_stage analysis complete, committed as 908d7a2f870
